name: Dogelord
description: Such Pokemon. Very battle. Wow. Born from a Shiba Inu who stared at a computer screen for too long and absorbed the entire 2010s internet. Its fur is permanently Comic Sans. It communicates exclusively in broken English compliments.

moves.name: ✨ Much Wow
moves.desc: Hits the opponent with such force. Very damage. A barrage of floating Comic Sans compliments deals massive confusion. Wow.

moves.name: 😏 Trollface Leer
moves.desc: Problem? Dogelord flashes a classic Trollface at the opponent, lowering their defense as they cringe into the past.

moves.name: 🌈 Nyan Dash
moves.desc: Transforms into a Pop-Tart and rockets through the opponent at full rainbow speed. The song plays the entire time. Nobody can stop it.

moves.name: 😎 YOLO Mode
moves.desc: You Only Live Once. Dogelord puts on deal-with-it sunglasses in slow motion and sharply raises its own ATK. Drake approves.

moves.name: 🍋 Ain't Nobody Got Time
moves.desc: Sweet Brown appears. Nobody has time for this. Dramatically lowers the opponent's speed as they stop to process what just happened.

moves.name: 🖼️ Loss.jpg
moves.desc: Dogelord draws four panels. The opponent stares, trying to figure out if this is a meme. While distracted, they get poisoned AND confused. Is this loss?
